turns.assistant_text:
Here are some recent updates and information about Ronaldo de Lima:

1. **Ronaldo Luís Nazário de Lima Icon EA FC 26 - 94 - Rating and Price**  
   Ronaldo is recognized as a professional footballer from Brazil, currently featured as an icon in EA FC. He is a 183 cm tall, right-footed striker. [More details here](https://www.futbin.com/26/player/21901_869/ronaldo-luis-nazario-de-lima).

2. **Ronaldo Nazário - Business Owner and President of Real Valladolid**  
   Ronaldo is not only a former footballer but also a business owner and the president of La Liga club Real Valladolid. [Read more on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/100089266381319/posts/ronaldo-nazarioronaldo-lu%C3%ADs-naz%C3%A1rio-de-lima-widely-known-as-ronaldo-or-o-fen%C3%B4men/1022743697377834).

3. **Olympic Bronze Medalist**  
   Ronaldo led Brazil to an Olympic bronze medal at the Atlanta 1996 games. He is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players of all time. [View the post on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DY4wBbADZAo).

4. **FIFA World Cup History**  
   Ronaldo de Lima is the second top scorer in FIFA World Cup history, with 15 goals for Brazil. He has scored the most braces in World Cup history. [Check the post here](https://www.instagram.com/p/DY1yFx3jG6l).

### Recent Tweets:
- **Ronaldo Luís Nazário de Lima O Fenômeno**  
  A tweet highlighting Ronaldo's nickname and legacy. [View tweet](https://x.com/Kay_Machili/status/2061735488315134414).

- **Discussion on Ronaldo and Luis Figo**  
  A mention of Ronaldo in a tweet discussing other football legends. [View tweet](https://x.com/Seanmisin/status/2061735168457474129).

- **Ronaldo as the Best Forward**  
  A tweet claiming Ronaldo de Lima is the best forward to ever exist. [View tweet](https://x.com/Ofochebe/status/2061710943717900620).

These sources provide a comprehensive overview of Ronaldo de Lima's achievements and current relevance in football discussions.
